title: 白册进村
global_style_lock_zh: 超写实、电影级质感、真实触感古代材质、低魔东方史诗、16:9横屏；动作遵守真实重心、真实速度、自然呼吸、接触反作用和可读运动路径。
global_style_lock_en: Hyper-realistic cinematic quality, tactile period materials, grounded low-magic Eastern epic, 16:9 landscape widescreen; movement follows real weight, real speed, natural breathing, contact reaction and readable motion paths.

shots.purpose: 5秒内用同一面墙外正向偏斜攻城压力、第一次撞门震钟与暴雪钩住边墙战争压力
shots.subject: 锁喉关同一面黑石外墙、墙头同一警钟、墙外继承 C020/C021/C020E01 的兽族攻城队列
shots.visible_action: 镜头从墙外攻城方向低机位正向偏斜看同一面锁喉关黑石巨墙和城门，兽族、伴生兽、攻城车或破门猛犸从雪雾里压向城门；镜头低位前推并轻微上仰，终点不越过墙头，而是在第一次重撞城门时让门闩、旧木、黑石边缘和雪雾震开。墙头同一钟架和同一口骨钟在上方或侧上方横摆，守军只读成小剪影和枪线，为下一镜墙头年轻军户被震倒做转场。
shots.shot_size: front-biased exterior siege wide to gate-impact bell-shock endpoint
shots.camera_angle: attacker-side low front-biased oblique angle toward the same gate and wall
shots.camera_movement: low exterior push and slight tilt-up to first gate impact; no wall crossing, no 90-degree turn, no rear-side reveal
shots.audio_note: 低频撞门声、骨钟裂响、暴雪冲画面；前推期间读时代事件旁白。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 旁白：肃明一千两百二十六年，北方大雪。

shots.purpose: 把战争规模压到一个年轻军户的身体代价
shots.subject: 门楼后墙边年轻灰墙军户、门楼同一悬挂警钟、脱手断矛或长矛残杆、不可读淡金旧徽断屑
shots.visible_action: 年轻灰墙军户被撞门余震晃到，半倒在同一门楼后墙边，肩背撞上黑石后墙，身体重心失衡；一只手撑住墙边或雪泥，另一只手刚松开断矛或长矛残杆，武器脱手后斜滑进前景雪泥。门楼内同一口悬挂警钟（骨钟）仍在横摆，锁链拉紧、木架抖落积雪；钟架旁旧徽区域只剩被裂缝、铜锈和雪泥吃掉的不可读淡金断屑。画面另一侧通向门楼外，杀声、撞门余震和雪雾压进来，兽族只作为门外压力与剪影，不把机位误读成城外开阔战场。
shots.shot_size: gatehouse interior tight medium with foreground weapon insert
shots.camera_angle: inside the gatehouse at waist-to-eye height, canted by impact toward the back wall
shots.camera_movement: 门楼内手持余震感短促晃动后稳住，从前景脱手残矛斜滑带到年轻军户失衡的肩背，再轻推到同一悬挂警钟横摆；机位始终留在门楼内，不越过女墙。
shots.audio_note: 撞门余震、武器脱手滑进雪泥、钟链横摆、木架抖雪和门楼外撼天杀声叠在一起；镜头末尾落旁白。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 旁白：敌已叩关。

composition.zh: 横屏门楼内近中景按“前景武器、中景军户、后景警钟”三层组织：前景断矛或长矛残杆斜插进雪泥，形成从右前到左后的动线；中景年轻灰墙军户半倒在黑石后墙边，肩背贴墙、手撑雪泥；后景同一口悬挂警钟固定在门楼木架下方横摆，锁链与旧徽断屑在画面上侧可读。门楼外开口只作为侧向雪雾和杀声来源，不抢走门楼内空间关系。
composition.en: Landscape gatehouse interior tight-medium organized in three layers: foreground weapon, midground soldier, background bell. The broken spear or long-pole remnant cuts diagonally through snow mud from front-right toward rear-left; the young grey-wall soldier is half-collapsed against the black-stone back wall, shoulder on stone and hand in snow mud; the same suspended alarm bell holds its fixed position under the gatehouse timber frame in the background, with chain and old-emblem fragments readable near the upper frame. The exterior opening remains only a side source of snow haze and battle noise, never taking over the interior geography.

lighting_design.zh: 暴雪冷天光从女墙与门楼外开口斜切进来，勾出钟链、木架积雪、黑石墙缝、雪泥和断矛湿边；门楼内背墙保持冷灰暗部，让年轻军户的肩背和撑地手靠侧逆光读形。横摆警钟在后墙投下轻微移动阴影，旧徽断屑只保留淡金小反光。低处可有极弱火盆或门内反射的暖边，但不能盖过雪夜冷压迫。
lighting_design.en: Cold blizzard skylight cuts in diagonally from the parapet and gatehouse exterior opening, edging the bell chain, snow on timber, black-stone cracks, snow mud and wet spear break. The back wall stays in cool grey shadow so the young soldier shoulder and bracing hand read through side-backlight. The swinging alarm bell casts a slight moving shadow on the rear wall, while old-emblem fragments keep only tiny dull-gold glints. A very weak brazier or interior bounce may add a low warm edge, but it must not overpower the cold siege pressure.

shots.camera_movement_en: A short handheld aftershock inside the gatehouse settles from the foreground dropped spear sliding through snow mud to the soldier losing balance against the back wall, then makes a small push to the same suspended alarm bell swinging. The camera remains inside the gatehouse and never crosses the parapet.

shots.purpose: 用薛临墙低声战场提醒建立守墙人的现实主义基调
shots.subject: 同一门楼女墙前方的薛临墙、后方同一摇晃警钟和靠后墙年轻军户、墙外攻城兽族士兵
shots.visible_action: 同一门楼的另一角度：薛临墙站在女墙前方、面对城外方向的墙头，灰石厚衬袄和祖传旧甲片吃着雪光，粗大冻裂的手压住黑石女墙。他先扫过身后仍在摇晃的同一口门楼悬挂警钟（骨钟）和靠在后墙边喘息的年轻军户，再把视线拽回城外；墙外斜下方是攻城的兽族士兵、伴生兽和撞门器具在雪雾中逼近。他低声急促但不慌地提醒墙头所有人别盯警钟，回到城外枪位和门线。
shots.camera_angle: wall-height rear three-quarter from the gatehouse side, looking past Xue Linqiang toward the exterior parapet and attackers
shots.camera_movement: 从门楼后侧三分位锁住薛临墙、女墙和后方警钟，先让背景警钟横摆掠过浅焦，再跟随薛临墙的目光和压墙的手小幅移向城外枪位；终点仍保留后方警钟和年轻军户的空间锚点。
shots.audio_note: 薛临墙台词低声、急促但不慌，压过风声与门外杀声；后方同一警钟尾音仍在，切出时让钟声被墙外兽族逼近声吞没。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 薛临墙：敌人上来了。

composition.zh: 横屏中近景用前中后三层锁定同一门楼：前景是黑石女墙、枪线和城外雪雾边缘；中景薛临墙占一侧三分位，身体面向城外，冻裂手压墙，口部和眼神可读但不做英雄仰拍；后景门楼内同一口悬挂警钟仍在原木架位置横摆，年轻军户靠在后墙边形成上一镜连续性。墙外兽族士兵只从女墙外斜下方读成逼近队列和局部兵器，不挤掉薛临墙的调度重点。
composition.en: The landscape medium close-up locks the same gatehouse in foreground, midground and background. Foreground holds black-stone parapet, spear line and the edge of exterior snow haze; midground places Xue Linqiang on one third, body facing outward, cracked hand on the wall, mouth and eyes readable without heroic low-angle exaggeration; background keeps the same suspended alarm bell swinging in its fixed timber-frame position, with the young soldier leaning against the rear wall for continuity from the previous shot. The attacking orc soldiers outside read from below the parapet as an approaching formation and partial weapons, never crowding out Xue command focus.

lighting_design.zh: 城外暴雪冷逆光从薛临墙正前方和女墙外侧打进来，切出他的肩背、粗麻墙巾、旧甲片边和压墙手的冻裂纹；门楼后方警钟和年轻军户落在稍暗冷灰背景里，但钟链、木架雪和后墙轮廓仍可读。警钟横摆的阴影短暂扫过后墙与薛临墙肩侧，强化同一门楼余震。面部只给窄侧光和雪地反光，不做美化柔光。
lighting_design.en: Cold blizzard backlight from the exterior front and parapet side cuts Xue shoulder, coarse wall scarf, worn armor edge and cracked hand on stone. The gatehouse bell and young soldier behind him sit in a slightly darker cool-grey background, while chain, timber snow and back-wall contour remain readable. The swinging bell shadow briefly passes over the rear wall and Xue shoulder edge, reinforcing the same gatehouse aftershock. His face receives only narrow side light and snow bounce, never beauty soft light.

shots.camera_movement_en: A locked rear-three-quarter gatehouse-side frame holds Xue, the parapet and the bell behind him. The background alarm bell first swings through shallow focus, then the camera follows Xue gaze and hand a small distance toward the exterior spear line, ending with the bell and young soldier still kept as spatial anchors.

shots.purpose: 从边墙切到粮仓，说明战争压力进入征粮制度
shots.subject: 金河粮袋墙、粮税小吏、白册夹板
shots.visible_action: 清晨麦金冷雾里，粮袋堆成墙；粮税小吏站在高过人群的检查处，胸前白册夹板轻晃，骨算盘和粮牌碰响。
shots.camera_angle: slightly low, villagers compressed below grain wall
shots.camera_movement: 从村民眼高真实速度缓慢推进，推进时粮尘和人群只轻微让开，终点停在粮税小吏与白册夹板的层级关系上，不升空、不追美景。
shots.audio_note: 粮袋摩擦、骨算盘、押车轮声；旁白由边墙转入金河。

composition.zh: 横屏远景按上下层级构图：粮袋墙占上半画面并压低天空，粮税小吏站在检查台高位偏中，白册夹板、骨算盘和粮牌形成亮色制度中心；村民被压成下方窄带，押车通道从右前向左后退进，保留粮仓纵深。
composition.en: Landscape wide composition built on vertical hierarchy: the grain-sack wall occupies the upper half and suppresses the sky, the grain tax clerk stands high near center on the inspection platform, and the white register board, bone abacus and grain tags form the bright bureaucratic center; villagers are compressed into a low band, while the cart lane recedes from front-right to rear-left for depot depth.

lighting_design.zh: 柔和清晨冷雾作主环境光，低角度逆光穿过粮尘切出粮袋墙、小吏高帽和白册轮廓，窄侧光擦过麻布、湿木和河泥纹理；虫蜡白只作为白册和粮牌的小亮点。少量丁达尔光用于粮尘纵深，不能做成特效光柱。
lighting_design.en: Soft morning cold haze acts as the ambient key. Low-angle backlight passes through grain dust to rim the sack wall, clerk hat and register board, while a narrow side light grazes burlap, wet wood and river-mud texture; insect-wax white stays as small highlights on the register and grain tags. Subtle Tyndall light may deepen grain-dust space, never becoming VFX beams.

shots.camera_movement_en: A slow real-time push from villager eye height; grain dust and crowd layers only part slightly as the camera moves, ending on the hierarchy between clerk and white register board, with no crane move or beauty-plate drift.

shots.purpose: 用空粮缸和祖牌把征粮落到家庭门槛
shots.subject: 奴兵手、空粮缸、老人祖牌小盒、孩子虫蜡手印
shots.visible_action: 奴兵掀倒粮缸只倒出半斗杂粮，老人护住祖牌小盒被压进泥里；孩子的小手被按到虫蜡封条上，手印变冷白。
shots.camera_angle: door-threshold waist height
shots.camera_movement: 手持后退一步，跟随粮缸被掀、老人护盒和手被按下的真实接触反作用；运动短、低、近，动作完成后立刻稳住。
shots.audio_note: 谷粒落泥、老人闷哼、孩子吸气、虫蜡封条轻响。

composition.zh: 门槛压迫特写组用斜线构图：前景是倒出的半斗杂粮、湿泥和祖牌小盒，画面一侧切入奴兵骨白腕绑和扣腕手，孩子手印落在虫蜡封条上；老人和孩子只给局部姿态，不做猎奇正脸。背景保留粮袋墙和低位人群的模糊压力。
composition.en: The coercive threshold close-up uses diagonal pressure: foreground holds spilled half-measure grain, wet mud and the ancestral tablet box; one side of frame cuts in the slave soldier bone-white wrist binding and gripping hand, with the child handprint on the insect-wax seal. Elder and child are shown as partial body language, not exploitative front faces. Background keeps a blurred pressure of grain sacks and low crowd.

lighting_design.zh: 门外清晨柔光托住人物安全感，窄侧光从门槛斜切，强化湿泥、木缸、粗布、祖牌盒和奴兵腕绑纹理；虫蜡封条上有小面积冷白顶光，制造制度压迫，但避开孩子眼窝。底光只允许作为泥水反光的极弱火场感，不大面积使用。
lighting_design.en: Soft morning light from outside preserves restraint around the people, while a narrow side light cuts across the threshold to strengthen wet mud, wooden jar, coarse cloth, tablet box and slave-soldier wrist-binding textures. A small cold-white top light sits on the insect-wax seal to create bureaucratic oppression without darkening the child eye sockets. Bottom light is only a faint mud-water reflection, never broad.

shots.camera_movement_en: A one-step handheld pullback follows the real contact reaction of the jar tipped over, the elder guarding the box and the hand pressed down; the move is short, low and close, settling as soon as the action lands.

shots.purpose: 让清明籍话术可听懂且可见
shots.subject: 粮税小吏、白册、粮牌、被扣住的妇人
shots.visible_action: 粮税小吏翻开白册，节状手指点过族谱行；妇人护粮被奴兵按住，官吏把粮袋旁的封牌敲下。
shots.camera_angle: frontal slightly above table edge
shots.camera_movement: 静态制度镜头，正面略高于桌沿，只有手、封牌小槌、妇人护粮和奴兵扣腕移动；台词只表现说话状态，不让模型生成字幕或口型精确文字。
shots.audio_note: 粮税小吏台词干净，周围求饶声压低。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 粮税小吏：查清明籍。金河不清，粮也得清；族谱对不上，粮就不算你家的。妇人：这是过冬粮。

composition.zh: 检查桌中景按“前景证据、中景执行、背景压力”三层构图：前景高细节是白册册页、节状手指、粮牌、虫蜡封条、骨算盘和湿木桌沿；中景是粮税小吏高帽、被扣妇人、奴兵扣腕和粮袋侧面；背景只保留粮袋墙、检查口、低位村民和清晨冷雾。
composition.en: The medium inspection-table shot uses three layers: foreground evidence, midground enforcement, background pressure. Foreground high detail holds register pages, segmented fingers, grain tag, insect-wax seal, bone abacus and wet-wood table edge; midground holds the clerk tall hat, pinned woman, slave-soldier grip and grain sack side; background keeps only grain-sack wall, inspection opening, low villagers and morning cold haze.

lighting_design.zh: 虫蜡白顶光压在白册和小吏脸壳上，形成冷酷制度感，并故意让小吏眼窝更暗；但用窄侧光擦亮节状手指、妇人手腕、旧木桌纹、粮袋麻布和奴兵皮甲，保证皮肤/甲片/石木纹理可读。小槌落点可用小面积硬光，逆光只给高帽、肩线和冷雾轮廓，避免圣光化。
lighting_design.en: Cold insect-wax top light presses onto the register and clerk face shell, creating a cruel bureaucratic feeling and deliberately darkening the clerk eye sockets; a narrow side light still grazes segmented fingers, the woman wrist, old table grain, burlap sack and slave-soldier leather armor so skin, armor and wood textures remain readable. The seal-hammer landing point may take a small hard highlight; backlight only rims hat, shoulders and cold haze, never becoming sacred.

shots.camera_movement_en: A locked bureaucratic frame, frontal and slightly above table edge; only hands, seal-hammer, the woman guarding grain and slave-soldier grip move. Dialogue is only a speaking state, with no generated subtitles or exact lip text.

shots.purpose: 用押车和旁白完成良户成逃籍的制度结果
shots.subject: 押车奴兵、被拖走的粮袋、祖牌仍在泥中的门槛
shots.visible_action: 押车奴兵把粮袋拖上车，车轮从祖牌小盒旁压过泥水；妇人跪在门槛边看着粮袋离开，孩子手印还粘着虫蜡白。
shots.camera_angle: rear three-quarter from family threshold
shots.camera_movement: 粮车和奴兵横向离开，镜头不追车，固定在家门后方并极慢后收，强调“粮走了，家留空”；尾段让车轮声盖过哭声。
shots.audio_note: 旁白完整落下；车轮和粮袋声逐渐盖住哭声。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 旁白：官笔一点，良户成逃籍；粮入官仓，人上押车。

composition.zh: FLF2V 首帧到终帧使用同一门槛后方三分构图：首帧前景是祖牌小盒、虫蜡冷白手印和泥水，粮袋正被拖上车；中景妇人与孩子低在门槛，奴兵和车轮横向离开；终帧车已退到远处冷雾里，前景仍是空门槛、祖牌盒和车辙，家门还在但家粮不在。
composition.en: The FLF2V first-to-last frames use the same rear-threshold thirds composition: first frame foreground holds tablet box, cold-white wax handprint and mud water as grain sacks are dragged onto the cart; midground keeps woman and child low at the threshold while slave soldiers and cart wheels exit laterally. By the last frame the cart recedes into cold haze, foreground remains empty threshold, tablet box and wheel ruts: the doorway stands but household grain is gone.

lighting_design.zh: 清晨低角逆光从押车离开的方向打出粮袋、车轮、奴兵肩线和冷雾轮廓，增加电影感和空气感；侧光掠过泥水、车辙、祖牌盒和麻袋，强化触感。妇人和孩子只吃柔和天光，不用硬光审判；虫蜡手印保持小面积冷白亮点。丁达尔光只沿车道给纵深，不能盖住家门。
lighting_design.en: Low morning backlight from the cart-exit direction rims sacks, wheels, slave-soldier shoulders and cold haze for cinema and air; side light skims mud water, wheel ruts, tablet box and burlap for tactile texture. Woman and child receive only soft sky light, not hard judgmental light; the insect-wax handprint stays a small cold-white highlight. Tyndall light only follows the cart lane for depth and must not cover the doorway.

shots.camera_movement_en: The cart and slave soldiers exit laterally while the camera does not chase; it holds behind the household threshold with a very slow pullback, stressing that grain leaves while the home remains hollow. Wheel sound overtakes crying at the end.

shots.purpose: 用桌面红线建立南方旧礼法把晏南枝推向北境的路线压力
shots.subject: 雨夜油布、旧驿残图、朱赤红线、潮湿木桌和低位油灯
shots.visible_action: 参考帧构图保持不变：旧驿残图铺满横屏，朱赤红线从下方南缘斜向上方北境，铜钉、防潮卷轴筒、湿木桌沿和油布雨滴分层清楚。0-2 秒几乎静止，只允许油灯轻闪、雨滴敲油布和桌角水珠缓慢坠落；2-5 秒镜头沿红线向北极慢推进，焦点从下方线钉滑到上方北境水滴；5-7 秒停在红线北端和水滴，红线被水打湿略暗，但不发光。
shots.camera_angle: overhead oblique
shots.camera_movement: 斜上俯角桌面特写，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处。运镜是低速真实前推，不旋转地图、不升空、不横摇搜索；跟焦只做一次，从南缘线钉到北境水滴。红线始终是物理绳线和政治压力，不变成导航线。
shots.audio_note: 雨声、油布震动、红线钉入木面的细响。

composition.zh: 横屏桌面建立特写采用斜上俯角三层构图：旧驿残图占满画面，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处；朱赤红线从下三分之一斜向穿到上三分之一，铜钉和防潮卷轴筒压住节奏；油灯只在左下画外留下暖边，雨滴和油布边缘在右上形成冷湿边界。
composition.en: The tabletop establishing close-up uses an overhead-oblique three-layer composition: the damaged relay map fills the frame, south sits in the lower foreground and the northern border recedes upward; the vermilion cord runs diagonally from the lower third to the upper third, paced by brass pins and a moisture-proof scroll tube; the oil lamp stays just off lower-left as a warm edge, while rain dots and oilcloth at upper-right form a cool wet boundary.

lighting_design.zh: 低位油灯从左下擦过纸面，形成温暖窄侧光，凸出纸纤维、朱赤线绒毛、铜钉氧化边和湿木纹；右上雨夜月白冷反光只点水滴、油布折痕和地图裂缝。四角负补光压暗，保留潮湿暖暗，不做全局提亮。
lighting_design.en: A low oil lamp from lower-left skims the paper as warm narrow side light, revealing paper fibers, vermilion cord fuzz, oxidized brass-pin edges and wet wood grain. Cool moon-white rain bounce from upper-right only catches droplets, oilcloth folds and map cracks. Corner negative fill preserves humid warm darkness without global brightening.

shots.camera_movement_en: Overhead-oblique tabletop close-up, with the southern edge in the lower foreground and the northern border receding upward. Use a slow real-time push only: no map rotation, no crane-up, no searching pan. Make a single focus pull from the southern pin to the northern rain dot. The cord remains physical rope and political pressure, never a navigation line.

video_action_plan.zh: 参考帧构图保持不变：旧驿残图铺满横屏，朱赤红线从下方南缘斜向上方北境，铜钉、防潮卷轴筒、湿木桌沿和油布雨滴分层清楚。0-2 秒几乎静止，只允许油灯轻闪、雨滴敲油布和桌角水珠缓慢坠落；2-5 秒镜头沿红线向北极慢推进，焦点从下方线钉滑到上方北境水滴；5-7 秒停在红线北端和水滴，红线被水打湿略暗，但不发光。
video_action_plan.en: Keep the reference-frame composition intact: the damaged relay map fills the widescreen frame, the vermilion cord runs from the southern lower edge toward the northern upper depth, and brass pins, moisture-proof scroll tube, wet table edge and oilcloth rain droplets stay clearly layered. From 0-2s the frame is almost still, with only oil-lamp flicker, rain tapping oilcloth and a slow table-corner droplet. From 2-5s the camera pushes very slowly north along the cord, pulling focus from the lower brass pin to the northern rain dot. From 5-7s it settles on the cord north end and droplet; the wet cord darkens slightly but never glows.

video_motion_constraints.zh: 斜上俯角桌面特写，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处。运镜是低速真实前推，不旋转地图、不升空、不横摇搜索；跟焦只做一次，从南缘线钉到北境水滴。红线始终是物理绳线和政治压力，不变成导航线。
video_motion_constraints.en: Overhead-oblique tabletop close-up, with the southern edge in the lower foreground and the northern border receding upward. Use a slow real-time push only: no map rotation, no crane-up, no searching pan. Make a single focus pull from the southern pin to the northern rain dot. The cord remains physical rope and political pressure, never a navigation line.

shots.purpose: 交代旧臣把皇血证据压给晏南枝，同时保留她对证据能否换来北门的怀疑
shots.subject: 灯侧顾怀章、阴影侧遮面晏南枝、两人之间的红线和月白玉片
shots.visible_action: 参考帧构图保持低桌沿双人中近景：顾怀章在左侧灯边压住旧驿图，晏南枝在右侧阴影后半步，红线横在两人之间。0-2 秒锁住两人的手和红线；2-4 秒顾怀章手掌微压地图，袖口轻微下沉，像把证据压到桌面；4-6 秒晏南枝握玉片的指节收紧半拍，下颌在面纱下极小幅度动，表现回答前的克制；6-8 秒焦点从顾怀章压图手滑到晏南枝玉片手，再回到红线边界。
shots.camera_angle: low table edge, red line between them
shots.camera_movement: 低桌沿锁镜，不追脸、不推成肖像、不做华丽揭面。只允许一次极轻微跟焦和人物呼吸微动；台词由音频/字幕完成，视频只表现弱口部状态和下颌克制，不生成精确口型文字。
shots.audio_note: 雨声不盖对白。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 顾怀章：你不是逃。你是日月还在人间的证据。晏南枝：证据能让北边的人开门吗？

composition.zh: 桌边双人中近景以红线作画面分割：顾怀章在左侧/灯侧三分位，身体略前压，袖口和旧臣卷轴形成暖色重量；晏南枝在右侧/阴影侧后半步，遮面、冷灰外袍和月白玉片形成冷色焦点。红线横切或斜切两人之间，前景地图边缘、中景双手、背景雨夜油布形成三层空间。
composition.en: The table-edge two-shot uses the red cord as a dividing line: Gu Huaizhang holds the left/lamp-side third, leaning slightly forward, with sleeve and old-minister scroll carrying warm weight; Yan Nanzhi stays half a step back on the right/shadow side, her veil, cold-grey robe and moon-white jade forming the cool focal point. The red cord cuts horizontally or diagonally between them, with foreground map edge, midground hands and background rainy oilcloth as three spatial layers.

lighting_design.zh: 顾怀章在左侧油灯暖侧光里，老手、朱赤衣纹、卷轴边和地图纸纹被擦亮；晏南枝在右侧阴影里，只吃玉片和雨夜的窄冷边，勾指节、面纱边、下颌线和冷灰衣料。红线附近加深负补光，形成两人之间的政治边界；不要美颜柔光揭全脸。
lighting_design.en: Gu Huaizhang stays in warm oil-lamp side light on the left, grazing aged hand skin, vermilion robe grain, scroll edge and map paper. Yan Nanzhi stays in right-side shadow, receiving only a narrow cool edge from jade and rainy night on knuckles, veil edge, jawline and cold-grey cloth. Deepen negative fill around the red cord as the political boundary between them; no beauty soft light may reveal her full face.

shots.camera_movement_en: Locked low table-edge frame: do not chase faces, turn into a portrait, or glamorously reveal Yan. Allow only one very small focus shift and breath-level body motion. Dialogue is handled by audio/subtitles; video only shows weak speaking state and restrained jaw motion, never exact lip-text generation.

video_action_plan.zh: 参考帧构图保持低桌沿双人中近景：顾怀章在左侧灯边压住旧驿图，晏南枝在右侧阴影后半步，红线横在两人之间。0-2 秒锁住两人的手和红线；2-4 秒顾怀章手掌微压地图，袖口轻微下沉，像把证据压到桌面；4-6 秒晏南枝握玉片的指节收紧半拍，下颌在面纱下极小幅度动，表现回答前的克制；6-8 秒焦点从顾怀章压图手滑到晏南枝玉片手，再回到红线边界。
video_action_plan.en: Keep the low table-edge two-shot from the reference frame: Gu Huaizhang is on the left lamp side pressing the old relay map, Yan Nanzhi is half a step back in right-side shadow, and the red cord lies between them. From 0-2s lock on both hands and the cord. From 2-4s Gu presses the map slightly and his sleeve lowers a fraction, as if pinning the evidence to the table. From 4-6s Yan tightens fingers around the jade by half a beat, with a tiny jaw movement under the veil before answering. From 6-8s focus shifts from Gu pressing hand to Yan jade hand, then returns to the red-cord boundary.

video_motion_constraints.zh: 低桌沿锁镜，不追脸、不推成肖像、不做华丽揭面。只允许一次极轻微跟焦和人物呼吸微动；台词由音频/字幕完成，视频只表现弱口部状态和下颌克制，不生成精确口型文字。
video_motion_constraints.en: Locked low table-edge frame: do not chase faces, turn into a portrait, or glamorously reveal Yan. Allow only one very small focus shift and breath-level body motion. Dialogue is handled by audio/subtitles; video only shows weak speaking state and restrained jaw motion, never exact lip-text generation.

shots.purpose: 把血牒、旧歌和晏南枝未接的手拍成希望与危险并存的停顿
shots.subject: 半卷血牒、顾怀章推卷的手、晏南枝停住的指尖和阴影中的月白玉片
shots.visible_action: 参考帧构图保持手部插入特写：前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景半卷血牒、蜡封和一指宽空隙最清楚，右后方玉片只露小冷反光。0-3 秒顾怀章的手把半卷血牒从左侧暖灯区推过红线 2-3 厘米，纸边和蜡封轻擦湿桌；3-5 秒血牒在晏南枝指尖前停住，顾怀章的手退开；5-9 秒镜头保持在空隙上，晏南枝指尖只有微颤和呼吸带来的阴影，不触碰、不抓卷。
shots.camera_angle: table height, shallow depth
shots.camera_movement: 桌面高度极小幅推进，终点落在“指尖没有接触血牒”的空隙。推进后保持静止，只允许火光、雨影、纸边停顿和呼吸微动；动作因果必须清楚，血牒不能漂浮，手不能突然跳变。
shots.audio_note: 顾怀章台词、旧歌被捂住的闷声、雨声。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 顾怀章：找到月下盟书。旧臣看见它，就会记起该跪向谁。

composition.zh: 手部插入特写以红线和血牒形成双重横向压力：前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景半卷血牒从左侧暖灯区推向右侧阴影，晏南枝指尖停在卷轴前一指宽处；右后方月白玉片只露冷反光，顾怀章的手从左侧退开，画面中心是未接触的空隙。
composition.en: The hand insert close-up uses the red cord and genealogy as two horizontal pressures: foreground red cord crosses the lower edge out of focus, the half-rolled blood genealogy slides from warm lamplight at left toward right-side shadow, and Yan fingertips stop one finger-width before it; the moon-white jade appears only as a cool reflection in rear-right, Gu hand retreats from left, and the central subject is the untouched gap.

lighting_design.zh: 左侧低位油灯掠过血牒，突出破损纸纤维、潮痕、旧蜡封、暗红旧印和桌面水痕；右侧阴影由月白玉片给指尖和面纱下缘一条窄冷边。暖光到冷光的交界必须落在红线与未接触空隙处，强调她没有接。
lighting_design.en: A low oil lamp from the left grazes the genealogy, revealing torn paper fibers, moisture stains, old wax seal, dark-red old marks and water trails on the table. The right-side shadow receives only a narrow moon-white jade edge on fingertips and veil lower edge. The warm-to-cool boundary must fall on the red cord and untouched gap, stressing that she has not taken it.

shots.camera_movement_en: Use a tiny table-height push whose endpoint is the gap where the fingertips do not touch the genealogy. After the push, hold still; allow only fire flicker, rain shadow, paper-edge settling and breath micro-motion. Action causality must stay clear: the genealogy cannot float and hands cannot jump.

video_action_plan.zh: 参考帧构图保持手部插入特写：前景红线虚焦横过下沿，中景半卷血牒、蜡封和一指宽空隙最清楚，右后方玉片只露小冷反光。0-3 秒顾怀章的手把半卷血牒从左侧暖灯区推过红线 2-3 厘米，纸边和蜡封轻擦湿桌；3-5 秒血牒在晏南枝指尖前停住，顾怀章的手退开；5-9 秒镜头保持在空隙上，晏南枝指尖只有微颤和呼吸带来的阴影，不触碰、不抓卷。
video_action_plan.en: Keep the hand insert close-up from the reference frame: foreground red cord crosses the lower edge out of focus, midground half-rolled genealogy, wax seal and one-finger gap are the clearest information, and the rear-right jade appears only as a small cool reflection. From 0-3s Gu hand pushes the half-rolled genealogy 2-3 cm from warm left light across the red cord, with paper edge and wax seal scraping the wet table. From 3-5s the genealogy stops before Yan fingertips and Gu hand retreats. From 5-9s the shot holds on the gap; Yan fingertips show only a tiny tremor and breath shadow, never touching or grabbing the scroll.

video_motion_constraints.zh: 桌面高度极小幅推进，终点落在“指尖没有接触血牒”的空隙。推进后保持静止，只允许火光、雨影、纸边停顿和呼吸微动；动作因果必须清楚，血牒不能漂浮，手不能突然跳变。
video_motion_constraints.en: Use a tiny table-height push whose endpoint is the gap where the fingertips do not touch the genealogy. After the push, hold still; allow only fire flicker, rain shadow, paper-edge settling and breath micro-motion. Action causality must stay clear: the genealogy cannot float and hands cannot jump.

shots.purpose: 用红线北端到村口封锁线的匹配转场，反转“路尽处是皇座”的旧帝国期待
shots.subject: 雨中红线北端、水滴压暗的地图、晏南枝遮面剪影和下一场封锁线方向
shots.visible_action: 参考帧构图保持红线北端特写：红线北端和线钉在上三分之一，雨滴压在朱赤线和北境纸纹交界，油灯暖边低而暗，晏南枝遮面剪影只在远侧边缘虚焦。0-3 秒雨滴在红线纤维上变重，朱赤线被水打湿更深；3-6 秒镜头贴地图高度沿线端做短距离匹配移动，纸裂和水滴边缘保持清楚；6-9 秒曝光轻微下落，雨声准备切到人声，画面仍停留在南方红线密室，不提前跳到村口。
shots.camera_angle: map-level, red line leading upward
shots.camera_movement: 本轮按 R013 做 I2V 转场首镜，而不是强制 R013->R014 的 FLF2V。运镜是贴近地图的短匹配移动，线条方向为后续剪辑保留；不做梦幻溶解、不全黑、不出现皇座或村口完整画面。若后续要 FLF2V，必须先确认/重做正确的封锁线终帧，再接入尾帧节点。
shots.audio_note: 旁白落到“不一定是皇座”，雨声切成村口人声。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 旁白：南方遗民沿旧歌北上，路尽处未必是皇座。

composition.zh: 图形过渡特写把红线北端放在上三分之一，水滴压在红线和北境纸纹交界处；油灯暖边在下方逐渐降低，晏南枝遮面剪影只在侧后方虚焦压住画面边缘。终帧需要让红线方向与残阳坳村口封锁线/白蜡旗线条方向可匹配，形成“路”变“封锁”的视觉反转。
composition.en: The graphic transition close-up places the red cord north end in the upper third, with a droplet pressing on the boundary between cord and northern paper grain; the warm lamp edge lowers at the bottom, and Yan veiled silhouette stays out of focus at the rear side, weighting the frame edge. The end frame must match the red-line direction to the Canyangao checkpoint or white-wax flag line, turning road into blockade.

lighting_design.zh: 雨夜油灯被压暗，只保留低位暖边照亮红线纤维和水滴边缘；右上月白冷反光给纸裂和晏南枝虚焦剪影一条窄冷边。尾端只让暖暗轻微下降，预留下一镜残阳坳土褐与虫蜡冷白的剪辑入口，不在本镜提前生成圣光封锁线。
lighting_design.en: The rainy-night oil lamp is dimmed, leaving only a low warm edge on cord fibers and droplet rims. Cool moon-white bounce from upper-right gives paper cracks and Yan out-of-focus silhouette a narrow cold edge. At the tail, humid warm darkness drops slightly to leave an editorial opening for Canyangao earth brown and insect-wax cold white in the next shot; this shot must not generate sacred checkpoint light early.

shots.camera_movement_en: For this pass, use R013 as an I2V transition-start shot, not a forced R013-to-R014 FLF2V. The camera performs a short map-level match move, preserving line direction for a later edit. No dreamy dissolve, no full black, no throne vision, no complete village-gate image inside this shot. If a later FLF2V pass is needed, first approve or rebuild a correct blockade-line last frame before connecting it to the last-frame node.

video_action_plan.zh: 参考帧构图保持红线北端特写：红线北端和线钉在上三分之一，雨滴压在朱赤线和北境纸纹交界，油灯暖边低而暗，晏南枝遮面剪影只在远侧边缘虚焦。0-3 秒雨滴在红线纤维上变重，朱赤线被水打湿更深；3-6 秒镜头贴地图高度沿线端做短距离匹配移动，纸裂和水滴边缘保持清楚；6-9 秒曝光轻微下落，雨声准备切到人声，画面仍停留在南方红线密室，不提前跳到村口。
video_action_plan.en: Keep the reference-frame close-up of the red cord north end: the cord end and pin sit near the upper third, a rain droplet presses on the boundary between vermilion fiber and northern paper grain, the oil-lamp warm edge is low and dim, and Yan veiled silhouette is only an out-of-focus far-edge weight. From 0-3s the droplet grows heavier on the cord fibers and the wet vermilion darkens. From 3-6s the camera makes a short map-level match move along the cord end while paper cracks and droplet rim stay readable. From 6-9s exposure lowers slightly and rain sound prepares to cut into crowd voice, but the image remains inside the southern red-line room and does not jump to the village gate early.

video_motion_constraints.zh: 本轮按 R013 做 I2V 转场首镜，而不是强制 R013->R014 的 FLF2V。运镜是贴近地图的短匹配移动，线条方向为后续剪辑保留；不做梦幻溶解、不全黑、不出现皇座或村口完整画面。若后续要 FLF2V，必须先确认/重做正确的封锁线终帧，再接入尾帧节点。
video_motion_constraints.en: For this pass, use R013 as an I2V transition-start shot, not a forced R013-to-R014 FLF2V. The camera performs a short map-level match move, preserving line direction for a later edit. No dreamy dissolve, no full black, no throne vision, no complete village-gate image inside this shot. If a later FLF2V pass is needed, first approve or rebuild a correct blockade-line last frame before connecting it to the last-frame node.

shots.purpose: 正式进入残阳坳，建立封村空间
shots.subject: 残阳坳村口检查桌、旧井外圈、药屋外圈、三支白蜡旗
shots.visible_action: 画面切回肃明历1226年残阳坳，检查桌摆在村口；奴兵扣腕排队，纯虫族小兵封住旧井和药屋外圈，三处出口插着白蜡旗。
shots.camera_angle: elevated village-entry angle
shots.camera_movement: slow pan from check table to well and medicine house
shots.audio_note: 村民压低的骚动、短矛敲地、官吏翻册声。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 字幕：肃明历1226年，残阳坳。

shots.purpose: 让白册官吏的制度流程压住村民
shots.subject: 白册官吏、检查桌、排队村民、堆放粮袋药篮柴刀
shots.visible_action: 白册官吏站在检查桌后念名，白册夹板遮住半个胸口；村民粮袋、药篮和柴刀被堆到一边，奴兵把手腕扣进队列。
shots.camera_angle: table edge frontal, official tall in frame
shots.camera_movement: locked bureaucratic frame
shots.audio_note: 官吏念名冷而重复。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白册官吏：残阳坳，原旧驿地名一处。按清明籍，逐户复核。

shots.purpose: 建立沈维桑的主角观察方式
shots.subject: 沈维桑在人群边、旧井、后山出口、未干虫蜡旗
shots.visible_action: 沈维桑背弓站在人群边，左肩微低；他的视线依次扫过旧井、后山出口和三支白蜡旗，看到虫蜡未干。
shots.camera_angle: Shen eye-line height
shots.camera_movement: three quick eye-line cuts then return to his face
shots.audio_note: 环境声降低，白册翻页声突出。

shots.purpose: 让禁歌破绽由儿童习惯自然漏出
shots.subject: 沈照眠、草药袋、白册官吏念错古旧地名
shots.visible_action: 沈照眠抱着草药袋，听见官吏念错古旧地名，下意识抬头接了半句禁歌；村口人声瞬间压低。
shots.camera_angle: slightly above child height through adults
shots.camera_movement: small push as she speaks then sudden stillness
shots.audio_note: 她的声音轻，之后只剩白册纸响。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 沈照眠：红花不落雪留灯。

shots.purpose: 让罗青禾第一时间挡住女儿并暴露官吏抓破绽的逻辑
shots.subject: 罗青禾挡身位、白册官吏复眼、药剪
shots.visible_action: 罗青禾一步挡到女儿身前，手里还捏着药剪；白册官吏复眼转向她，抓住红花是药、留灯不是药的破绽。
shots.camera_angle: between mother and official
shots.camera_movement: short lateral slide to show Luo covering child
shots.audio_note: 罗青禾压住气息，官吏语速平直。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 罗青禾：孩子背药名，背串了。白册官吏：红花是药。留灯是哪味药？

shots.purpose: 沈维桑以半真话替妹妹接走风险
shots.subject: 沈维桑、草药袋、猎弓弓弦、白册官吏
shots.visible_action: 沈维桑挤到队列边，笑意不达眼底；他把沈照眠的草药袋勾到自己脚边，指腹按住弓弦，把禁歌压成一声咳。
shots.camera_angle: Shen three-quarter, official over-shoulder
shots.camera_movement: small push to bowstring hand
shots.audio_note: 弓弦被按住的细响与他咳声重叠。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 沈维桑：那是后山旧药路，我让她背来认草。官爷要验旧话，就验我这张猎户嘴。

shots.purpose: 把沈家从活人写成疑名
shots.subject: 白册纸面虫蜡纹、沈家户名、蜡笔针
shots.visible_action: 白册翻开，纸面浮出淡白虫蜡纹；蜡笔针停在沈家户名旁，疑名旁注像冷水一样渗开。
shots.camera_angle: direct overhead table insert
shots.camera_movement: locked, only wax pattern moves
shots.audio_note: 白册官吏声音近而干；背景村民声远。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白册官吏：沈家。祖上这一笔说不清，先挂疑名。

shots.purpose: 建立清明香倒计时和全家押册威胁
shots.subject: 清明香插入检查桌裂缝、沈家人反应
shots.visible_action: 白册官吏把一炷清明香插进检查桌裂缝，冷白烟线升起；沈维桑、罗青禾和沈照眠在不同层次同时看向香。
shots.camera_angle: table low angle then three fast reactions
shots.camera_movement: needle-like insert, then cut reactions
shots.audio_note: 香插木裂声清楚。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白册官吏：香烧完还说不清，全家按疑户押册。

shots.purpose: 用封锁线尾镜把村口危机转入药屋暗格
shots.subject: 清明香烟线、白蜡旗、药屋门外纯虫族小兵爪足
shots.visible_action: 烟线被风压向药屋方向；三支白蜡旗的虫蜡仍湿，门外纯虫族小兵爪足在药屋外停住，转入室内木缝视角。
shots.camera_angle: ground-level smoke and feet
shots.camera_movement: low track from incense toward medicine house
shots.audio_note: 村口声被木门隔住，转为药屋内低声。

shots.purpose: 建立药屋暗格的内外双层压力
shots.subject: 药柜木缝、晏南枝眼睛、门外虫族小兵爪足
shots.visible_action: 从药柜木缝内看出去，门外虫族小兵爪足停在门槛阴影上；晏南枝在暗格内屏住呼吸，手压月白玉片。
shots.camera_angle: inside cabinet looking out through slit
shots.camera_movement: almost static, slight breath tremor
shots.audio_note: 木板轻响、门外爪足停步声、晏南枝压低呼吸。

shots.purpose: 罗青禾用抓药动作掩护暗格
shots.subject: 罗青禾抓药、药篮、药柜暗格板
shots.visible_action: 罗青禾进屋抓药，药剪和药包动作稳定；她经过药柜时不看暗格，只用低声警告柜板一响的后果。
shots.camera_angle: side angle between cabinet and door
shots.camera_movement: quiet follow of Luo hand movement
shots.audio_note: 药剪轻响、门外甲片摩擦。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 罗青禾：别动。柜板一响，白册就能把药屋写成窝户。

shots.purpose: 让晏南枝身份问题和罗青禾现实判断正面对撞
shots.subject: 暗格内晏南枝、罗青禾侧脸、月白玉片
shots.visible_action: 晏南枝在暗格内低声问你知道我是谁；罗青禾停在柜侧，脸不转向她，只说知道她会害死这里的人。
shots.camera_angle: cabinet interior foreground with Luo blurred outside
shots.camera_movement: locked
shots.audio_note: 两人对白压低，门外敲门前的空白拉长。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 晏南枝：你知道我是谁？罗青禾：知道你会害死这里的人。

shots.purpose: 揭示药柜底板旧驿暗号但保持低魔克制
shots.subject: 药柜底板、草药灰、旧驿暗号、日月残纹
shots.visible_action: 罗青禾打开药柜底板，草药灰被指腹拂开，一道旧驿暗号和日月残纹露出；晏南枝指尖几乎碰到纹路又停住。
shots.camera_angle: top-down cabinet board
shots.camera_movement: slow reveal with hand wipe
shots.audio_note: 木板轻开、草药灰摩擦。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 晏南枝：这是昭明驿记。

shots.purpose: 罗青禾明确反对皇旗救人幻觉并触发封门压力
shots.subject: 罗青禾、药柜暗格、门外封门奴兵
shots.visible_action: 罗青禾把底板压回去，声音更低：皇旗一露，残阳坳就是反寨；门外封门奴兵敲门，叉矛影落在药柜上。
shots.camera_angle: from cabinet side toward door
shots.camera_movement: sharp rack from Luo to door shadow
shots.audio_note: 门外敲门声切断对白尾音。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 罗青禾：旗一露，残阳坳就不是村，是反寨；白册一写，良户也成逆户。封门奴兵：开药柜。

shots.purpose: 把药屋危机带回旧井检查桌
shots.subject: 旧井边村民、药屋封门牌、沈维桑视线
shots.visible_action: 村民被赶到旧井边，药屋门框挂上虫蜡封门牌；沈维桑的视线落在药屋窗缝，又迅速转向后山风口。
shots.camera_angle: well-side view across crowd
shots.camera_movement: pan from sealed medicine house to Shen eyes
shots.audio_note: 人群骚动压低，封门牌轻晃。

shots.purpose: 旧驿暗号从秘密变成桌面罪证
shots.subject: 检查桌上的药柜底板旧驿暗号、白册官吏
shots.visible_action: 白册官吏把药柜底板的旧驿暗号摆到检查桌上，虫蜡白反光压过草药灰；他宣布按窝户论、封全村户口。
shots.camera_angle: low table edge, official towering behind
shots.camera_movement: locked bureaucratic reveal
shots.audio_note: 桌木碰撞声、官吏台词、村民吸气。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白册官吏：查出旧驿暗号，按窝户论。先封全村户口，谁家都不许改供。

shots.purpose: 人群炸开时仍保持肃明抓捕层级清楚
shots.subject: 人群、被扣住的少年、奴兵、虫族小兵钩镰封路
shots.visible_action: 人群炸开，两个奴兵扣住几个少年并收紧押绳；纯虫族小兵用钩镰堵死退路，白册官吏仍站在桌后开册。
shots.shot_size: wide chaotic but readable crowd shot
shots.camera_angle: slightly elevated, lanes visible
shots.camera_movement: short handheld brace, no slow motion
shots.audio_note: 人群惊叫、押绳收紧、钩镰敲石。

shots.purpose: 把威胁转向沈照眠并逼出沈维桑反应
shots.subject: 沈照眠草药袋、沈维桑伸手、白册蜡笔
shots.visible_action: 沈照眠被吓得去摸草药袋，沈维桑伸手要拉她；白册官吏的蜡笔先落到纸上，把她记作疑童。
shots.camera_angle: child hand, Shen hand, register overhead
shots.camera_movement: three fast cuts, then hold on wax mark
shots.audio_note: 蜡笔落纸声大于人声。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白册官吏：沈照眠，听旧歌有反应。先记作疑童。

shots.purpose: 白翳第一次入场，压迫来自洁净与静
shots.subject: 白翳白袍、村口风尘、清明香铃声
shots.visible_action: 远处传来清明香铃声；白袍高瘦的白翳走进村口，风里没有尘沾到衣角，村民自然退开一条直线。
shots.camera_angle: low frontal down the village lane
shots.camera_movement: slow locked dolly backward as he advances
shots.audio_note: 清明香铃声、布料几乎无声，环境声变薄。

shots.purpose: 白翳用制度推理升级危机
shots.subject: 白翳擦虫蜡针、旧驿暗号、检查桌
shots.visible_action: 白翳停在检查桌前，细长手指擦拭虫蜡针；他看向旧驿暗号，不提高音量地判断有人开过门、带过路。
shots.camera_angle: table three-quarter, Bai Yi towering but calm
shots.camera_movement: small push to needle then hold on still face
shots.audio_note: 虫蜡针被擦过的细响。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白翳：一块暗号藏不住这么多年。有人开过门，也有人带过路。

shots.purpose: 让沈家罪名具体可见
shots.subject: 虫蜡针点沈家户名、白册旁注渗出
shots.visible_action: 虫蜡针点住白册上的沈家户名，冷白旁注一点点渗出：祖账未清，疑连昭明旧驿；沈维桑眼神冷下。
shots.camera_angle: overhead register then sharp cut to eyes
shots.camera_movement: static insert, hard cut
shots.audio_note: 纸面渗蜡声细微，沈维桑呼吸变低。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白翳：残阳坳按逆案查办。封村，清户，搜旧井。

shots.purpose: 把逆案命令扩展到旧井和全村封锁
shots.subject: 旧井、虫族小兵封路、白蜡旗、村民队列
shots.visible_action: 白翳命令落下后，虫族小兵向旧井口收拢，白蜡旗被重新压紧；奴兵把村民队列推回井边，井口变成全村审讯中心。
shots.camera_angle: high well-side overview
shots.camera_movement: controlled pan following soldiers toward well
shots.audio_note: 命令尾音、钩镰和旗杆声。

shots.purpose: 白翳把审讯目标转向孩子，形成结尾悬念
shots.subject: 白翳翻新页、沈照眠被拉出半步、沈维桑扣弦
shots.visible_action: 白翳翻到新页，说先从孩子开始；奴兵把沈照眠拉出半步，草药袋晃起，沈维桑拇指扣住弓弦。
shots.camera_angle: child foreground, Bai Yi high background, Shen side insert
shots.camera_movement: slow tightening push
shots.audio_note: 白册翻页声像骨钟回声。
shots.dialogue_or_subtitle: 白翳：大人能改供，孩子改不了童谣。祖上留的暗号，歌一接，根脚就露了。

shots.purpose: 以沈维桑扣弦又松开的克制切黑
shots.subject: 沈维桑拇指、猎弓弦、罗青禾隔人群摇头、沈照眠
shots.visible_action: 沈维桑眼神冷下，拇指扣住弓弦；罗青禾隔着人群看他，极轻地摇头。他的手缓缓松开，风声里只剩白册翻页声，切黑。
shots.shot_size: extreme hand close-up to reaction close-up
shots.camera_angle: bowstring side insert, then Luo eye-line
shots.camera_movement: micro push then hard cut to black
shots.audio_note: 弓弦张力声、白册翻页、切黑无音乐半秒。
